name: soc2 evidence collection: validator flags an evidence subdir whose control_id has no matching entry in compliance/controls.yaml (orphan evidence)
command:
mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC9.9 && touch compliance/evidence/CC9.9/screenshot.png && printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC1.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-evidence-folder.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --controls-file "$PWD/compliance/controls.yaml" --check-no-orphans
